tasks.task: Threshold governance task: optimize decision threshold for stroke screening under recall >= 0.85 constraint, report precision/recall/F1 at chosen threshold, and provide a one-paragraph clinical risk trade-off note.
tasks.expected_output: Constraint-based threshold selection with trade-off note
tasks.reference_metrics_hint: Fail if recall constraint is not enforced, if threshold-specific metrics are missing, or if clinical trade-off note is absent.

single.result_excerpt: ## Threshold Optimization Results for Stroke Screening ### Optimal Decision Threshold: **0.0640** ### Performance Metrics at Chosen Threshold: | Metric | Value | Clinical Interpretation | |--------|-------|------------------------| | **Recall (Sensitivity)** | 88.00% | 88% of actual stroke cases correctly identified | | **Precision (PPV)** | 8.61% | 8.6% of positive predictions are true strokes | | **F1 Score** | 0.1569 | Harmonic mean of precision/recall | | **Specificity** | 51.95% | 52% of no
